abilities.name: Relish in Blood (Young Nephilim)
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that damaged a model, this model may remove a Glutted token to replace itself with a Young Nephilim and heal 4. If it does not have a Glutted token, it instead gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Grab On
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token. End this model's activation.

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Blood for Blood
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to this model. Any enemy models within range of the Black Blood (1) that cannot gain an Injured token because they already have one are dealt 1 damage.
